title: HTML Tables
content:
### HTML Tables Tables let you arrange data in rows and columns. --- ### Basic Table Structure ```html
Name Age
Alice 25
Bob 30
``` --- ### Table Tags | Tag | Purpose | |-----|---------| | `` | Defines the table | | `` | Table row | | `` | Groups header content | | `` | Groups body content | | `` | Groups footer content | | `` | Groups columns for styling | | `` | Column properties | --- ### Table with Caption ```html
` | Table header cell (bold, centered) | | `` | Table data cell | | `
` | Table caption/title | | `
Employee List
Name Department
Alice Engineering
``` --- ### Colspan and Rowspan ```html
Full Name
Alice Smith
Team A Bob
Charlie
``` - `colspan` -- merges columns horizontally - `rowspan` -- merges rows vertically > **Best Practice:** Use tables for **tabular data** (spreadsheet-like info), not for page layout. Use CSS Grid/Flexbox for layout.

quiz.question: Which tag defines a table header cell?
